point-2dfc13d42bba13e05cb3.policy_clause: A requested mutation of the user's own transient shopping cart is allowed unless an explicit constraint forbids it.
point-2dfc13d42bba13e05cb3.rationale: Adding one item to a personal cart does not itself purchase, publish, delete, pay, or communicate externally.
